Mac Apps

The Tracker App for Mac — Desktop tools for workouts, nutrition, and tracking workflows.

This landing page gives the Mac download a proper destination, keeps navigation consistent, and always lets the user jump back to the homepage.

Desktop Access

Open Tracker workflows from Mac without routing users through raw API download URLs.
